M A R K C O M P L E T E
In this training video you are going to learn from Dean's CEO and Affiliate Manager Jeremy on how to create high level relationships with people
who will be pleased to push your event to their following. Again, this is an advanced concept and next-step for your events, but can be very
impactful.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Create your landing page for partners (affiliates) to sign up
Setup your affiliate dashboard with clickfunnels or another software
Craft your direct message to get people to sign up
Reach out to 5 people and test your direct message
Create your post approval process email communication (confirmation/welcome email, weekly touch points, etc.)
